xml.name: version_command
xml.version_command: python - <<'PY' import importlib.util spec = importlib.util.find_spec("conf.conf") if spec is None or spec.origin is None: print("beacon2-ri-tools") else: import os print(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(spec.origin))) PY

param.name: dataset_id
param.label: Dataset identifier
param.help: Value passed to --datasetId and used to build Beacon identifiers.

param.name: reference_genome
param.label: Reference genome used by VCF conversion

param.name: only_process_reads_with_allele_frequency
param.label: Require allele-frequency information when parsing VCF files

param.name: populations_by_allele_counts
param.label: Calculate population frequencies from allele counts

param.name: num_rows
param.label: Maximum number of rows or variants to process

macros.token: # Auto-generated by the Galaxy wrapper. csv_folder = './csv' output_docs_folder = './out/' entry_type = 'all' only_process_reads_with_allele_frequency = True populations_by_allele_counts = True reference_genome = 'GRCh37' case_level_data = False exact_heterozygosity = False num_rows = 15000000 verbosity = False database_host = '${database.database_host}' database_port = ${database.database_port} database_name = '${database.database_name}'
